query:
SELECT
                id AS sample_id,
                titulo AS "sample_title!",
                slug AS "slug!",
                creador_id AS "creator_id!",
                es_premium AS "is_premium!",
                CAST(precio AS double precision) AS "price?"
            FROM samples
            WHERE id = $1
              AND eliminado_en IS NULL
              AND estado = 'activo'
            LIMIT 1
